query: SELECT 'product' as type, id, name, imageUrl FROM products WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl NOT LIKE '%cloudinary.com%' UNION ALL SELECT 'subcategory' as type, CAST(id AS CHAR) as id, name, imageUrl FROM subcategories WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl NOT LIKE '%cloudinary.com%' ORDER BY type, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT 'product' as type, id, name, imageUrl FROM products WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl NOT LIKE '%cloudinary.com%' UNION ALL SELECT 'subcategory' as type, CAST(id AS CHAR) as id, name, imageUrl FROM subcategories WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl NOT LIKE '%cloudinary.com%' ORDER BY type, id;
